---
title: "Castle Builders, or, The Deferred Confirmation, The. By the author of “Heartsease,” “The Heir of Redclyffe,” “Scenes and Characters,” etc."
---

## Castle Builders, or, The Deferred Confirmation, The. By the author of “Heartsease,” “The Heir of Redclyffe,” “Scenes and Characters,” etc.

**By Charlotte Mary Yonge**

**Published:** 1854
**Genre:** Fiction (modern)
**Format:** Book

**Publisher:** John and Charles Mozley, 6 Paternoster Row, London

### Notes

The character of Constance recurs in <i>The Pillars of the House.</i>

---

[← Back to all letters](../../letters.html)
